core_findings: King Wen adjacent pairs are generated by finite carrier involutions R, C, RC; 0 of 32 adjacent pairs require scalar ordinal adjacency as the transition law.
The exceptions to reverse-only pairing are exactly symmetry/stabilizer collapses: palindromic carriers where C=RC, and anti-palindromic carriers where R=C.
Corrected Orthad invariants were rechecked from the zip: 36 B, 36 Q, 6 L; six BQ seats per lap; Fibonacci carried-pair recurrence; theta advances six quarters per lap; final rank 7.
The corpus can now be represented in one operational automata normal form across Orthad, Ancient Yi, Wilhelm, and MFE/Liu.
open_blockers: Ancient Yi full translation and line-order confirmation.
Latest active Phase selector/floor source from HDD.
Formal modular-B operator-family theorem and negative controls.
